name: io.github.codespar/mcp-xero
description: MCP server for Xero — global cloud accounting (UK/AU/NZ leader, expanding in US). Contacts, invoices, payments, items, accounts, reports.

environmentVariables.name: XERO_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Xero OAuth2 access token (Bearer). Obtain via Xero OAuth2 flow; rotate on expiry.

environmentVariables.name: XERO_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Xero tenant/organization id sent in the Xero-tenant-id header on every request.
